# Changelog

All notable changes to this project will be documented in this file.

The format is based on [Keep a Changelog](https://keepachangelog.com/en/1.0.0/),
and this project adheres to [Semantic Versioning](https://semver.org/spec/v2.0.0.html).

## [Unreleased]

### Added
- WASM dependencies (wasmtime, wit-bindgen) for component support
- WIT interface definitions for CLI and worktree runner
- Lefthook configuration generator module
- Comprehensive GitHub Actions CI workflow
- Pre-commit hooks with Lefthook
- EditorConfig for consistent formatting
- CODEOWNERS for code ownership
- CONTRIBUTING.md with development guidelines
- CHANGELOG.md for version tracking

### Changed
- Enhanced documentation with enforced coverage (`#![deny(missing_docs)]`)
- Updated README with current status vs intended purpose
- Improved project structure with proper module organization

### Fixed
- Documentation comments for all public APIs
- Test coverage for new worktree commands
- Build system integration for all components

## [0.1.0] - 2024-08-01

### Added
- Initial CLI structure with command parsing
- Basic command implementations (test, build, generate, install, list)
- WASM component management commands
- Worktree management commands with WASM runner component
- Comprehensive test suite (18 tests total)
- Build system with component compilation
- Documentation generation system
- Repository structure visualization tools

### Features
- **CLI Commands**: Complete command-line interface with help and version
- **WASM Integration**: Scaffolded WASM component architecture
- **Worktree Management**: WASM component for managing Git worktrees
- **Documentation**: Auto-generated documentation from source code
- **Testing**: Integration and unit tests for all functionality

### Technical
- Rust workspace with multiple components
- WASM component architecture with WIT interfaces
- Lefthook integration framework
- Cross-platform build support
- Comprehensive error handling

---

## Version History

- **0.1.0**: Initial release with CLI structure and WASM scaffolding
- **Unreleased**: Production-ready Git workflow and CI/CD setup

## Contributing

To add entries to this changelog:

1. Add your changes under the appropriate section in `[Unreleased]`
2. Use the conventional commit format for commit messages
3. Update this file when creating releases

### Change Categories

- **Added**: New features
- **Changed**: Changes in existing functionality
- **Deprecated**: Soon-to-be removed features
- **Removed**: Removed features
- **Fixed**: Bug fixes
- **Security**: Vulnerability fixes
